mapper.select: ( select vo.org_id as id, vo.org_nm as name, vo.org_cd as code, vo.par_cd as p_code, vo.par_nm as p_name, vo.is_leaf as is_last_lvl, '1' as to_add from dataintegration.view_hsp_entity vo MINUS select id, name, code, p_code, p_name, is_last_lvl, '1' as to_add from system_manage_org where deleted = 0 ) union ( select id, name, code, p_code, p_name, is_last_lvl, '2' as to_add from system_manage_org where deleted = 0 MINUS select vo.org_id as id, vo.org_nm as name, vo.org_cd as code, vo.par_cd as p_code, vo.par_nm as p_name, vo.is_leaf as is_last_lvl, '2' as to_add from dataintegration.view_hsp_entity vo )
